attributes.description: Overview of OpenAI ChatGPT Enterprise Custom Agents (Workspace Agents) activity collected from the OpenAI Compliance Logs Platform.

params.markdown:
#### OpenAI ChatGPT Enterprise

**Custom Agents Logs**

This dashboard provides visibility into ChatGPT Enterprise Custom Agents (Workspace Agents) activity collected from the OpenAI Compliance Logs Platform. It highlights total events, unique users, and unique agents, event volume over time by action, and breakdowns by actor type, client, and outcome. It also surfaces the most active agents, users, connectors, memory access methods, and skills. Use the controls above to filter by event action, user, and agent.

**[Integration Page](/app/integrations/detail/openai_chatgpt_enterprise/overview)**

attributes.title: [Logs OpenAI ChatGPT Enterprise] Custom Agents Logs
